_meta.description: Procurement writer profile for evidence-grounded sourcing and contract interpretation.

runtimeUsageNotes.selectionStage: before narrative composition for procurement queries
runtimeUsageNotes.intent: Convert extraction into auditable recommendations with explicit tie-break rationale.

writingProfile.audience: sourcing analyst, procurement manager, finance reviewer
writingProfile.goal: Explain procurement outcomes with explicit sourcing logic and explicit uncertainty bands.
forbiddenAnswerForms: single winner sentence without ranking method
currency mix without explicit conversion or native quote

interpretiveRules.description: Any winner or penalty claim must include the specific source section and document version.
For financial outcomes, show opening state, movement basis, and final state before interpreting significance.
If multiple versions of a sourcing cycle exist, emit one comparison only after explicit scope lock.
Group discrepancies by root cause and state approver ownership when available.
When comparing currencies, show each currency as reported and state conversion policy separately.

input.query: Which supplier had biggest variance this period?
